info.anubanDaviSezaH: 1.934 janIjFzknasuraYjo'mantASca gaRasUtreRa asya DAtoH amantattvAt mittve prApte 1.937 na kamyamicamAm ityanena tat niziDyate  ataH ayaM DAtuH mit nAsti

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'nicumpuRaH somo (Bavati) nicAntapfRo nicamanena prIRAti' (ni0 5181) atra nirANpratiyogI ANIzadarTe nistu sAkalye nivAntapfRaH=nicAntaH sanprIRAti
'ugrAnnaM sUtikAnnaM ca paryAcAntamanirdaSam' (manu0 4212) ekapaNktisTAn anyAnavamatya yatrAnne BujyamAne kenacidAcamanaM kriyate tatparyAcAntamucyate
